speaker: rep
text: This is Sarah from PhoneBurner. We help sales teams make more calls in less time. Do you have a quick minute?

speaker: prospect
text: I've got about two minutes, what's this about?

speaker: rep
text: Perfect. I noticed your team is using a manual dialer right now. Most teams like yours see a 3x increase in conversations when they switch to a power dialer. Would it be worth a 15-minute demo to see how it works?

speaker: rep
text: It starts at $149 per seat per month. But honestly the ROI conversation is more interesting — most teams pay for it in the first week with the extra meetings they book. Can I send you a quick case study?

speaker: prospect
text: Sure, send it over. My email is john at acme dot com.

speaker: rep
text: Great, I'll send that right now. And I'll include a link to book a demo whenever you're ready. Thanks for your time, John.
